scripts.db:create: bun x wrangler d1 create booth-plus-backend-db --binding DB --update-config
scripts.db:migration:create: bun x wrangler d1 migrations create DB
scripts.db:migrate:local: bun x wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: bun x wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.db:migrate:ci: bun x wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --persist-to .wrangler/ci
scripts.compile: bun run typegen:check && bun x tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
